title: Plastoid Armor
description: Adds several types of armor for balancing Mekanism.
body:
REQUIRES:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d0b0d83c26524daa0e6aa67a24d0f059f3ae237.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a0460579ce1bf7b04fa1b5da530ad0189f28c3a_0.webp)

This mod is intended to be balancing Mekanism adding 3 types of armor - Stormtrooper, Marksman and Tank, and each of them has its own route to upgrade.
